mapper.insert: MERGE INTO film_category t USING (SELECT #{filmId} AS film_id, #{categoryId} AS category_id) s ON (t.film_id = s.film_id AND t.category_id = s.category_id) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (film_id, category_id, last_update) VALUES (s.film_id, s.category_id, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now()))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM film_category WHERE film_id = #{filmId} AND category_id = #{categoryId}
